description_for_human: Commit mode for production AI agent actions. 48 MCP tools, one URL.
description_for_model: Veyra provides commit mode for AI agent production writes. Connect to https://mcp.veyra.to/sse for 48 tools (24 free reads, 24 protected writes). SDK: npm install @veyrahq/sdk-node. Key functions: commitAwareFetch(), requireTrustedWrite(), handleCommitRequired().
